plugins.verifyConditionsCmd: test -n "$NODE_AUTH_TOKEN" || { echo 'NODE_AUTH_TOKEN is required to publish @moor-sh/cli' >&2; exit 1; }
plugins.prepareCmd: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("package.json","utf8")); p.version="${nextRelease.version}"; fs.writeFileSync("package.json", JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+"\n")'
